title: Aetherworks Unofficial Extended Life
description: A fork of a dwarven-themed addon.
body:
Welcome to our fork of the Dwarven-themed Magic Addon [Aetherworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherworks). [Aetherworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherworks) is an addon for [Embers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-rekindled), that adds aetherium and powerful tools made out of it. But firstly the mod is about aetherium collecting and refining. Mine aetherium ore, build multiblocks and create new awesome tools on the mighty Forge! Aetherworks is meant to provide a late-game toolset for Embers. We decided to make our own fork of it, because fixing all errors with our [Embers fork](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-extended-life) via mixins would have been a nightmare. This way we can develop both forks closely together and further streamline our development process.

 

This mod will only ever support version 1.12.2.

 

If you play with [Embers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers) or [Embers Rekindled](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-rekindled) use the original [Aetherworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherworks) instead.

 

**Changes to [Aetherworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherworks) v1.0.0.3**

*   this now depends on [Embers Unofficial Extended Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-extended-life)
*   switched to **[RetroFuturaGradle](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/RetroFuturaGradle)**
*   added native [GroovyScript](https://github.com/Ender-Development/Aetherworks-Extended-Life/blob/master/examples/postInit/aetherworks.groovy) support
*   **transformed the github wiki into it's own chapter inside the Ancient Codex**
*   merged [Aetherium Ashen Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherium-ashen-armor) into this fork

 

**Credits:**

*   [v0idwa1k3r](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/v0idwa1k3r) - Original Author of Aetherworks
*   [tyon2006](https://www.curseforge.com/members/tyon2006) - Original Author of Aetherium Ashen Armor
